category_sources: source_facts.description says strongSwan is a VPN based on IPsec.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage uses the official strongSwan project site; official project styling is strongSwan.
docs_sources: Official strongSwan documentation is hosted at docs.strongswan.org.
repo_sources: Official strongSwan developer documentation says to get source code with git clone https://github.com/strongswan/strongswan.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an IPsec VPN; source_facts.executables lists ipsec and swanctl.
